headline: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Joins OpenID Foundation to Advance Risk-Aware Identity Security
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWD) is one of the best NASDAQ stocks to invest in for long term. On June 10, CrowdStrike announced it has joined the OpenID Foundation as a Sustaining Corporate Member and partnered with IDPro to drive the transition toward continuous, risk-aware identity security. By integrating real-time telemetry from its Falcon platform with […]
